Notice Of Petition For An Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Proceedings;Decl Of Farand C.Kan ;Decl Of Michael T. Woods;Petition;Mp&As
Off Calendar Apr-17-2002 Continued To May-01-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward F. Donohue, Esq., of LONG & LEVIT, (415-397-2222) appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party Michael T. Woods. Douglas A. Applegate, Esq., of SEILER EPSTEIN ZIEGLER & APPLEGATE (415-788-8180) appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party Jane Searight.

Parties tentatively agree to arbitration, a neutral accountant, discovery limitations, etc. as put on the record. Parties will return on May 1, 2002, only if agreement is not finalized. If there is no agreement then the tentative ruling will be adopted (Petition to compel arbitration denied except as to claims relating to IPO. Stay denied.) (JJM/CL) Reporter: Eric Throne CSR#7855

Notice Of Petition For An Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Proceedings;Decl Of Farand C.Kan ;Decl Of Michael T. Woods;Petition;Mp&As

Douglas A. Applegate, Esq. of SEILER EPTSTEIN ZIEGLER & APPLEGATE LLP 788-8180 for Plaintiff JANE SEARIGHT opposing party
